Phase 04 VERIFICATION.md — all human sections F/G/H passed

decisions.decision: Embed PDF inside .clmc file using ZIP archive format (jszip)
decisions.rationale: User raised portability concern: current design stores external PDF path, which breaks when .clmc is transferred to another PC with a different path or filename. User wants a single self-contained file any user can open on any machine. Four options considered: ZIP (jszip), custom flat binary, SQLite (sql.js), base64 JSON. ZIP/jszip chosen as best: pure JS (no native addon), standard inspectable format, no size overhead, easy migration from old plain-JSON .clmc files.

next_action: Plan Phase 4.1: change .clmc format from plain JSON to ZIP archive (jszip) embedding the PDF. Migration: on open, detect ZIP vs plain JSON, upgrade in-place. On save: store project.json + plan.pdf inside the archive. Remove absolutePath/relativePath resolution entirely — PDF is always self-contained.
context_notes: Phase 04 is 100% complete. All 253 tests pass. Human UAT sections A-H all passed. The new requirement is NOT in the roadmap — it needs a new phase (4.1).
